01 — IDENTITY

The Logo

The Al Shola mark pairs an industrial gear with a flame-styled car silhouette above the AL SHOLA wordmark — signalling precision engineering and automotive heat. Use the full-color logo wherever possible; choose the variant with the most contrast against its background.

PrimaryPNG
On DarkPNG
ReversedPNG
MonochromePNG
All logo files live in the /assets folder
02 — App Icon

Favicon & App Icon

For small sizes the wordmark drops away — the gear-and-car emblem reverses to white on the Heat Gradient tile, staying legible from a 16px browser tab to a home-screen icon.

Al Shola Auto Spare Parts
64px
32px
16px
512px 180px Apple 32px 16px
02 — PROTECTION

Clear Space, Minimum Size & Misuse

Give the logo room to breathe and never alter its construction. The rules below keep the mark legible from a shop sign to a WhatsApp avatar.

Clear Space

Keep clear space around the logo equal to the height of the gear teeth. Nothing — text, edges or other logos — should enter this zone.

Minimum Size

To stay legible, never render the full logo below 40px tall on screen or 14mm in print. For very small uses, switch to the gear-and-car emblem only.

72px — preferred
40px — minimum
✕ Don't stretch or distort
✕ Don't place on clashing colors
✕ Don't recolor the gradient
03 — COLOR

Color Palette

Shola Red and Flame Orange are the heart of the brand — used for energy, action and accents. Ink and neutrals carry the bulk of the layout so the reds stay powerful.

05 — Graphic Devices

Brand Devices & Patterns

Three recurring graphic elements give layouts their signature energy. Use them sparingly as accents — never let them overpower content.

The Heat Blade14° diagonal gradient panel for heroes and section edges.
The GearEngineering motif — watermark, loader, icon base.
Technical GridFaint blueprint grid + pulse node for data & maps.
06 — UI KIT

Core Components

The building blocks used across the website — buttons, badges and filter chips — in their approved styles.

Buttons

Orange is the primary action; WhatsApp green is reserved for chat CTAs.

Badges & Chips

Category badges sit on product imagery; filter chips drive the catalogue.

Brakes Suspension AC System
All Filters Electrical
07 — VOICE

Tagline & Voice

Confident, technical and helpful — we speak like a trusted parts expert, not a salesman. Always bilingual where space allows.

Not Just Parts —
The Correct Part, First Time
قطع غيار أصلية وبديلة عالية الجودة في دبي

Primary tagline. Supporting lines: "VIN-verified for exact fitment" · "Genuine, OEM & Aftermarket grades" · "Stock confirmed on WhatsApp."

✓ Do

  • Lead with accuracy & fitment confidence
  • Use specific part & brand names
  • Pair English with Arabic
  • Keep CTAs action-led ("Send Part Enquiry")

✕ Don't

  • Overpromise delivery times
  • Use generic filler ("best prices ever")
  • Mix more than two accent colors
  • Crowd the logo or stretch type
